ItemOperations_patchItem.usage:
request = ItemPatchRequest(
    item=ItemPatchRequestItem(
        name="example",
        description="example",
        priority=1
    )
)
await client.items.patch_item(id=1, request=request)
ItemOperations_patchItem.output: Item(id: int, name: str, description: str | None, priority: int | None)
